headline: T-Mobile launches bold new offers to win back customers
summary: There is no doubt that the telecom industry has become increasingly competitive as more consumers nationwide explore nontraditional phone and internet options. Amid this growing trend, T-Mobile has seen an uptick in phone customers canceling their service. In response, the carrier has launched a ...

headline: Aduna Accelerates Global Network API Adoption with Major Ecosystem Expansion at MWC
summary: Aduna, the global aggregator of standardized network APIs, today announced at Mobile World Congress key growth milestones demonstrating the acceleration and international adoption of telecom network APIs. Aduna is now partnered with 15 leading digital identity, fraud prevention, and communications providers with more lined up to join the Aduna ecosystem.

headline: Nvidia Pumps $4 Billion Into Laser Tech To Fuel Next AI Supercycle

headline: Assessing T‑Mobile US (TMUS) Valuation As Conflicting Fair Value Signals Emerge
summary: Why T-Mobile US (TMUS) is on investors’ radar today T-Mobile US (TMUS) is drawing fresh attention after recent trading leaves the stock showing mixed short term returns, including a small 1 day decline alongside gains over the month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for T-Mobile US. At a share price of $216.11, T-Mobile US has a 30 day share price return of 9.58% and an 8.28% year to date share price return. Its 1 year total shareholder return of a 19.44% decline contrasts with a...

headline: How The T-Mobile (TMUS) Narrative Is Shifting As Growth Targets Meet Cautious Valuations
summary: T-Mobile US has seen its modeled fair value price target move slightly from US$268.30 to US$268.52, a very small adjustment that still matters for investors closely tracking valuation updates. Analysts are balancing optimism around long term growth guidance with more cautious tweaks to price targets, as they reassess the sector ahead of upcoming results. As you read on, you will see how this small change fits into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch as the story continues to...
